# 🏥 Hospital Management System

Desktop application for hospital management built using **Java Swing**, **MySQL**, **JasperReports**, and **NetBeans IDE**.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🔐 Login System
- 👤 Patient Management
- 👨‍⚕️ Doctor Management
- 📅 Booking Management
- 💳 Payment Management
- 📄 Print Report (JasperReports)

---

## 🚀 Installation

### 1. Apache NetBeans IDE 29

📥 **[Download NetBeans 29](https://netbeans.apache.org/front/main/download/nb29/)**

---

### 2. MySQL Connector/J

Download **MySQL Connector/J**, kemudian tambahkan file `.jar` ke dalam **Libraries** pada project NetBeans.

📥 **[Download MySQL Connector/J](https://dev.mysql.com/downloads/connector/j/)**

---

### 3. iReport 5.6.0

Download plugin iReport.

📥 **[Download iReport 5.6.0](https://sourceforge.net/projects/erpbarcode/files/JasperSoft/iReport-5.6.0-plugin.zip/download)**

---

### 4. XAMPP

Install XAMPP kemudian jalankan **Apache** dan **MySQL**.

📥 **[Download XAMPP](https://www.apachefriends.org/download.html)**

---

### 5. Database

1. Buka **phpMyAdmin**
2. Buat database `hospital`
3. Import file **hospital.sql**

---

### 6. Run Project

Buka project menggunakan **NetBeans** kemudian klik:

```
Clean and Build
```

Lalu jalankan project dengan:

```
Run Project (F6)
```

---
